title: Enhanced Explosives
description: TNT can now be stronger, throwable, shootable & more.
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.19.2-green)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.1-green)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.2-green)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.3-green)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.4-green)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.6-green)

# New Features

<details>
<summary>New TNTs</summary>

* **Stronger TNT**: increased block & entity damage
* **Cluster TNT**: splits into multiple small TNTs when primed
* **Homing TNT**: flies towards the closest entity
* **Black Hole TNT**: pulls all close entities towards itself
* **Claymore TNT**: shoots many arrows in all directions upon exploding
* **Selective TNT**: destroys only the type of block it sits on during the explosion
* **Ender TNT**: teleports in a 16x16x16 block area when primed

</details>

<details>
<summary>Explosive Arrows</summary>


* **TNT Arrow**: explodes on impact
* **Concussive Arrow**: explodes on impact, but doesn't damage blocks
* **Carpet Bombing Arrow**: splits into many concussive arrows, when it begins falling

</details>


<details>
<summary>Other Additions</summary>

* **Dynamite**: throwable TNT, which bounces up again, after impacting a floor

</details>

# Feedback wanted!
Please report any bugs you find in my Discord. If you have ideas how I could improve this mod, or new content I should add, that feedback is also welcome.
